title: M2CContextResponse
description: Response object returned by M2CContextSelector.select(). Contains selected, compressed, and isolated context fragments along with token counts, effective level, compression metadata, and freshness information (spec/v0.2/supply.md §7.2).

contexts.description: Selected context fragments, one per media source

level.description: Context level used for this source

data.description: The selected and possibly compressed context data (partial MediaContext)

totalTokens.description: Total estimated tokens consumed across all context fragments

effectiveLevel.description: The level actually used. May differ from requested level if budget-constrained.

compression.description: Compression metadata (present if compression was applied)

lossLevel.description: Information loss level: 'none' (formatting only) / 'minimal' (redundancy removed) / 'moderate' (summarized) / 'aggressive' (heavy summarization)

freshness.description: Freshness metadata for context rot prevention

analyzedAt.description: When the analysis was performed (ISO 8601 UTC)

suppliedAt.description: When the context was last supplied to a consumer (ISO 8601 UTC)

ttlSeconds.description: Recommended time-to-live in seconds. After expiry, consumers SHOULD request fresh context.
